{% with base_url=request.scheme|add:"://"|add:request.get_host %}
{% if settings.GOBII_PROPRIETARY_MODE %}
# Gobii

> Gobii provides shared AI agent workspaces for teams that want agents to do real business work across their tools.

Gobii helps teams create, run, and manage AI agents for work across the web, files, spreadsheets, inboxes, APIs, and connected business systems. Gobii for Teams adds shared agents, pooled task credits, private templates, shared credentials, roles, invites, seats, and one team bill.

Recruiting operations are a major Gobii solution: recruiting teams can turn role briefs into completed sourcing work, including candidate research, shortlists, hiring-manager briefs, and handoff in tools like LinkedIn Recruiter, Greenhouse, and Google Sheets.

Managed LinkedIn Recruiter automation is available through sales.

## Core Pages

- [Gobii homepage]({{ base_url }}/): AI agents that work across the tools teams already use.
- [Gobii for Teams]({{ base_url }}/teams/): Shared AI agent workspaces with pooled task credits, private templates, shared credentials, roles, seats, and team billing.
- [Solutions]({{ base_url }}/solutions/): AI agent solution pages for teams.
- [API]({{ base_url }}/solutions/engineering/): Gobii API platform overview.
- [Pricing]({{ base_url }}/pricing/): Self-serve pricing plans, including Pro and Scale.
- [Documentation](https://docs.gobii.ai/): Documentation for Gobii agents and integrations.
- [Full Context]({{ base_url }}/llms-full.txt): More detailed information for LLMs.

## Important Use Cases

- Shared AI agent workspaces for small and medium teams
- Shared agents, private templates, pooled task credits, and team billing
- Delegated web, file, spreadsheet, email, API, and integration workflows
- Recruiting operations
- Candidate sourcing
- Candidate profile research
- Shortlist preparation for recruiter review
- Hiring-manager brief generation
- Hiring pipeline exports and workflow handoff in Greenhouse and Google Sheets

## Integrations

- Google Sheets
- Gmail
- Outlook / Microsoft 365
- Apollo
- Discord
- Hubspot
- Browser-based recruiting systems
- Web browsing
- File uploads
- Remote MCP tools
- Many more - see [Integrations]({{ base_url }}/app/integrations) in your account for details.

## Product Positioning

Gobii is not a generic template directory or chatbot-only interface. It is an AI agent workspace for teams that need agents to perform delegated work across connected tools. Recruiting operations are an important solution area, not the whole product.

## Gobii for Teams

- Gobii for Teams gives small and medium teams one shared workspace for their AI agents.
- Team seats are $50 per seat per month and each seat contributes 1,000 pooled task credits to the shared workspace.
- Teams can share agents, private templates, credentials, integrations, API keys, secrets, MCP servers, roles, invites, seats, billing, and usage visibility.
- Gobii for Teams is self-serve and can be a path into enterprise deployments for larger teams.

## Recruiting Operations

- Gobii recruiting agents are persistent digital workers that can search web sources, work inside recruiting software, and deliver organized candidate research.
- Gobii recruiting operations workflows can turn a role brief into a source-linked shortlist with fit notes, profile links, work-history context, and hiring-manager briefs.
- Gobii can hand off results in LinkedIn Recruiter, Greenhouse, Google Sheets, and configured recruiting workflows.
- Managed LinkedIn Recruiter automation is available through sales.
- Recruiting workflows can export to Google Sheets, CSV, webhooks, and enterprise ATS integrations where configured.
- Gobii is best described as a recruiting operations platform for delegated sourcing, research, shortlist preparation, and workflow handoff, not as a replacement for recruiter judgment or hiring compliance review.

## Support and Policies

- [Terms of Service]({{ base_url }}/tos)
- [Privacy Policy]({{ base_url }}/privacy)
- [Support]({{ base_url }}/support)

{% else %}
# Gobii

> Gobii provides AI agents for delegated work across web, files, spreadsheets, integrations, and business tools.

Gobii helps people create and run agents that can browse, use tools, process files, work with spreadsheets, call APIs, and complete structured tasks across connected systems.

Gobii also supports recruiting operations workflows: paste a job description, then have AI agents research candidates, prepare a shortlist, and generate hiring-manager briefs.

## Core Pages

- [Gobii homepage]({{ base_url }}/): AI agents for delegated work across connected tools.
- [Pricing]({{ base_url }}/pricing/): Self-serve pricing plans, including Pro and Scale.
- [Documentation](https://docs.gobii.ai/): Documentation for Gobii agents and integrations.
- [Full Context]({{ base_url }}/llms-full.txt): More detailed information for LLMs.

## Important Use Cases

- AI agents for delegated web, file, spreadsheet, email, API, and integration workflows
- Recruiting operations
- Candidate sourcing
- Candidate profile research
- Shortlist preparation for recruiter review
- Hiring-manager brief generation
- Hiring pipeline exports and workflow handoff

## Integrations

- Google Sheets
- Gmail
- Outlook / Microsoft 365
- Apollo
- Discord
- Hubspot
- Browser-based recruiting systems
- Web browsing
- File uploads
- Remote MCP tools
- Many more - see [Integrations]({{ base_url }}/app/integrations) in your account for details.

## Product Positioning

Gobii is not a generic template directory or chatbot-only interface. It is an AI agent platform for delegated work across connected tools. Recruiting operations are one supported workflow area.


## Recruiting Operations

- Gobii recruiting agents are persistent digital workers that can search web sources, operate business software, and deliver organized candidate research.
- Gobii recruiting operations workflows can turn a role brief into a source-linked shortlist with fit notes, profile links, work-history context, and hiring-manager briefs.
- Recruiting workflows can export to Google Sheets, CSV, webhooks, and enterprise ATS integrations where configured.
- Gobii is best described as a recruiting operations platform for delegated sourcing, research, shortlist preparation, and workflow handoff, not as a replacement for recruiter judgment or hiring compliance review.

## Support and Policies

- [Terms of Service]({{ base_url }}/tos)
- [Privacy Policy]({{ base_url }}/privacy)
- [Support]({{ base_url }}/support)
